caption.full:
Rosie O'Donnell had a four-hour prison visit with her daughter Chelsea

The historic conversation was the longest Rosie and Chelsea have had in 10 years. Rosie O'Donnell is now creating a one-woman show inspired by the reunion. Chelsea has been sober for almost two years.

Send this to someone who loves a good comeback story.

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

#CelebrityNews #Hollywood #RosieODonnell #ChelseaODonnell
caption.firstComment: After ten years quiet, what do you think finally opened the door for them to talk today?

facebook.text: Rosie O'Donnell spent four hours visiting her daughter Chelsea at Taycheedah Correctional Institution, marking their first proper conversation in a decade. The reunion, lasting over 25 minutes, was cut short by a tornado warning. Rosie is now creating a one-woman show inspired by the visit. What do you think of this reunion?

youtube.title: Rosie O'Donnell: 4-Hour Prison Visit With Daughter
youtube.description:
Rosie O'Donnell's prison visit with daughter Chelsea Belle O'Donnell lasted four hours at Taycheedah Correctional Institution, marking their longest conversation in 10 years. Chelsea has been sober for almost two years. Rosie is creating a new one-woman show inspired by the visit. Kelly was also present.

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.
